---
title: "test_bridge_direct.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_bridge_direct.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 2
logic_score: 6.80
style_score: 4.00
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.10
---

## Intent
The `test_bridge_direct.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)

### Exports
- `test`
